description_long: This coatrack features a classic dress form design with a torso-shaped body covered in a grid-patterned fabric, reminiscent of a tailor's mannequin. The body is mounted on a turned wooden post, which extends downward to a sturdy tripod base with elegantly curved legs for stability. The top of the coatrack is finished with a rounded wooden finial, adding a touch of traditional craftsmanship. The overall structure is slender and vertical, with the torso section providing a broad surface for hanging garments. The wood appears to be polished, giving the base and post a warm, rich tone. There are no visible hooks or umbrella holders, and the design is both functional and decorative, suitable for entryways or dressing rooms.
description: A dress form-style coatrack with a grid-patterned torso and a polished wooden tripod base, topped with a rounded finial. The design is elegant and functional, ideal for hanging garments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full torso shape, grid pattern, and the symmetrical tripod wooden base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the torso and the curvature of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the torso and the even spread of the tripod base.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the depth of the torso and the turned wooden post.
